visual_style: simple Korean instatoon, rounded hand-drawn line, flat colors, minimal background

cards.headline: AI 캐릭터가 왜 매번 다를까?
cards.scene: Mina looks at six generated character cards spread on a desk, each card looking slightly different.
cards.caption: 첫 장은 문제를 바로 보여준다.
cards.visual_prompt: Close-up desk composition with six small image cards spread out, Mina leaning in with a confused expression, simple white background, large empty top area for headline.
cards.regeneration_note: If too crowded, reduce the number of cards to three.

cards.headline: 매번 새로 설명하고 있었다
cards.scene: Mina types a long prompt into a laptop while looking tired.
cards.caption: 상황을 설명한다.
cards.visual_prompt: Medium shot of Mina typing a very long prompt on a laptop, small floating prompt lines around the screen, minimal desk background.
cards.regeneration_note: Keep text-like prompt lines abstract, not readable paragraphs.

cards.headline: 조금씩 흔들린다
cards.scene: Three versions of Mina appear side by side with different hair length, outfit color, and eye size.
cards.narration: 머리, 옷, 눈, 분위기가 조금씩 바뀌었다.
cards.caption: 문제를 시각적으로 보여준다.
cards.visual_prompt: Three side-by-side simplified versions of the same character silhouette, with subtle differences highlighted using small arrows, simple background.
cards.regeneration_note: Differences should be obvious but not grotesque.

cards.headline: 먼저 고정해야 하는 건 프롬프트가 아니었다
cards.scene: Mina places a character pack document before the image cards.
cards.caption: 관점이 바뀌는 카드.
cards.visual_prompt: Clear turn-card composition: Mina holds up a simple document labeled Character Pack, image cards are pushed to the side, brighter background.
cards.regeneration_note: Make the Character Pack document the visual center.

cards.headline: 외형은 팩에서, 장면은 카드에서
cards.scene: A simple split layout shows character identity on the left and card scene/action on the right.
cards.narration: 캐릭터 외형과 카드 장면을 분리하면 덜 흔들린다.
cards.caption: 핵심 원칙을 정리한다.
cards.visual_prompt: Simple two-column visual diagram with Mina in the center, left side showing character identity icons, right side showing scene and action icons, minimal text placeholders only.
cards.regeneration_note: Keep this card diagram-like and very simple.

cards.headline: Plan first, render later.
cards.scene: Mina stands calmly beside a neat stack of cards and a checked character pack.
cards.caption: 마지막 장은 포스터처럼 단순하게 끝낸다.
cards.visual_prompt: Poster-like closing card with Mina standing next to a neat stack of story cards and a checked character pack, lots of white space, calm confident mood.
cards.regeneration_note: Use the most whitespace in this final card.
